code:
# 1. GATHERING RAW RESOURCES
#   Iron ore (84) – Iron rocks (1,7)
move('Hero', 1, 7)
for _ in range(84):
    gather('Hero')

#   Coal (140) – Coal rocks (1,6)
move('Hero', 1, 6)
for _ in range(140):
    gather('Hero')

#   Ash wood (57) – Ash tree (-1,0)
move('Hero', -1, 0)
for _ in range(57):
    gather('Hero')

#   Birch wood (95) – Birch tree (3,5)
move('Hero', 3, 5)
for _ in range(95):
    gather('Hero')

#   Spruce wood (16) – Spruce tree (2,6)
move('Hero', 2, 6)
for _ in range(16):
    gather('Hero')

#   Jasper crystal (2) – Jasper rocks (0,6)
move('Hero', 0, 6)
for _ in range(2):
    gather('Hero')

# 2. CRAFT INTERMEDIATE MATERIALS
#   Steel (28) – Mining workshop (1,5)
move('Hero', 1, 5)
craft('Hero', 'steel', 28)

#   Hardwood plank (19) – Wood-cutting workshop (-2,-3)
move('Hero', -2, -3)
craft('Hero', 'hardwood_plank', 19)

#   Spruce plank (2) – Wood-cutting workshop (-2,-3)
craft('Hero', 'spruce_plank', 2)

# 3. FARM MOB RESOURCES
#   Skeleton parts – Skeleton (8,6)
move('Hero', 8, 6)
for _ in range(16):
    fight('Hero')

#   Wolf parts – Wolf (-3,0)
move('Hero', -3, 0)
for _ in range(9):
    fight('Hero')

#   Pig skin – Pig (-3,-3)
move('Hero', -3, -3)
for _ in range(5):
    fight('Hero')

#   Flying serpent parts – Flying serpent (5,4)
move('Hero', 5, 4)
for _ in range(5):
    fight('Hero')

#   Cowhide – Cow (0,2)
move('Hero', 0, 2)
for _ in range(8):
    fight('Hero')

#   Mushrooms – Mushmush (5,3)
move('Hero', 5, 3)
for _ in range(3):
    fight('Hero')

# 4. CRAFT FINAL GEAR
#   Skull Staff – Weapon-crafting workshop (2,1)
move('Hero', 2, 1)
craft('Hero', 'skull_staff', 1)

#   Steel Helm – Gear-crafting workshop (3,1)
move('Hero', 3, 1)
craft('Hero', 'steel_helm', 1)

#   Skeleton Armor
craft('Hero', 'skeleton_armor', 1)

#   Skeleton Pants
craft('Hero', 'skeleton_pants', 1)

#   Adventurer Boots  (already have recipe here)
craft('Hero', 'adventurer_boots', 1)

#   Steel Ring – Jewelry-crafting workshop (1,3)
move('Hero', 1, 3)
craft('Hero', 'steel_ring', 1)

#   Skull Ring
craft('Hero', 'skull_ring', 1)

#   Skull Amulet
craft('Hero', 'skull_amulet', 1)

# 5. EQUIP NEW GEAR
#   Weapon
unequip('Hero', 'weapon')
equip('Hero', 'weapon', 'skull_staff')

#   Helmet
unequip('Hero', 'helmet')
equip('Hero', 'helmet', 'steel_helm')

#   Body armor
unequip('Hero', 'body_armor')
equip('Hero', 'body_armor', 'skeleton_armor')

#   Leg armor
unequip('Hero', 'leg_armor')
equip('Hero', 'leg_armor', 'skeleton_pants')

#   Boots
unequip('Hero', 'boots')
equip('Hero', 'boots', 'adventurer_boots')

#   Rings
equip('Hero', 'ring1', 'steel_ring')
equip('Hero', 'ring2', 'skull_ring')

#   Amulet
equip('Hero', 'amulet', 'skull_amulet')

# 6. KILL THE OGRE
move('Hero', -5, -5)
fight('Hero')

code:
# 1. Collect monster drops
# Ogres for ogre_eye (4) and ogre_skin (4)
move('Hero', -5, -5)
for _ in range(4):
    fight('Hero')

# Vampires for vampire_blood (18)
move('Hero', 10, 6)
for _ in range(18):
    fight('Hero')

# Death Knights for red_cloth (7)
move('Hero', 8, 7)
for _ in range(7):
    fight('Hero')

# Skeletons for skeleton_bone (4)
move('Hero', 8, 6)
for _ in range(4):
    fight('Hero')

# Demons for demon_horn (13) and piece_of_obsidian (13)
move('Hero', 1, 13)
for _ in range(13):
    fight('Hero')

# Imps for demoniac_dust (3) and remaining piece_of_obsidian (43)
move('Hero', -1, 12)
for _ in range(43):
    fight('Hero')

# Owlbears for owlbear_hair (7)
move('Hero', 10, 1)
for _ in range(7):
    fight('Hero')

# Bandit Lizards for lizard_skin (5)
move('Hero', 4, 8)
for _ in range(5):
    fight('Hero')

# Wolves for wolf_hair (5)
move('Hero', -3, 0)
for _ in range(5):
    fight('Hero')

# 2. Gather raw resources
# dead_wood (128)
move('Hero', 9, 8)
for _ in range(128):
    gather('Hero')

# gold_ore (248)
move('Hero', 10, -4)
for _ in range(248):
    gather('Hero')

# ash_wood (24)  + one extra gather for sap
move('Hero', -1, 0)
for _ in range(25):
    gather('Hero')

# birch_wood (40)
move('Hero', 3, 5)
for _ in range(40):
    gather('Hero')

# jasper_crystal (4)
move('Hero', 0, 6)
for _ in range(4):
    gather('Hero')

# magical_cure (5)
move('Hero', 3, 6)
for _ in range(5):
    gather('Hero')

# sapphire (4) + ruby (1)  (mine 5 times on iron_rocks)
move('Hero', 1, 7)
for _ in range(5):
    gather('Hero')

# 3. Craft basic materials
# Dead-wood planks (16)
move('Hero', -2, -3)
craft('Hero', 'dead_wood_plank', 16)

# Hardwood planks (8)
craft('Hero', 'hardwood_plank', 8)

# Gold bars (31) and Obsidian bars (14)
move('Hero', 1, 5)
craft('Hero', 'gold', 31)
craft('Hero', 'obsidian', 14)

# 4. Craft equipment
# Greater Dreadful Staff
move('Hero', 2, 1)
craft('Hero', 'greater_dreadful_staff', 1)

# Gear items
move('Hero', 3, 1)
craft('Hero', 'gold_shield', 1)
craft('Hero', 'gold_helm', 1)
craft('Hero', 'lizard_skin_armor', 1)
craft('Hero', 'obsidian_legs_armor', 1)

# Jewelry
move('Hero', 1, 3)
craft('Hero', 'sapphire_ring', 1)
craft('Hero', 'ruby_ring', 1)
craft('Hero', 'sapphire_amulet', 1)

# 5. Equip new gear
unequip('Hero', 'weapon')
equip('Hero', 'weapon', 'greater_dreadful_staff')

equip('Hero', 'shield', 'gold_shield')

equip('Hero', 'helmet', 'gold_helm')

unequip('Hero', 'body_armor')
equip('Hero', 'body_armor', 'lizard_skin_armor')

unequip('Hero', 'leg_armor')
equip('Hero', 'leg_armor', 'obsidian_legs_armor')

equip('Hero', 'ring1', 'sapphire_ring')
equip('Hero', 'ring2', 'ruby_ring')
equip('Hero', 'amulet', 'sapphire_amulet')

# 6. Hunt the Cultist Emperor
move('Hero', -2, 13)
fight('Hero')

# gather raw wood for planks

# --- gather monster materials ---
move('Hero',-5,-5)
for i in range(12):
    fight('Hero')          # 12 Ogres -> ogre_eye & ogre_skin

move('Hero',10,6)
for i in range(5):
    fight('Hero')          # 5 Vampires -> vampire_blood

move('Hero',8,7)
for i in range(10):
    fight('Hero')          # 10 Death Knights -> red_cloth

move('Hero',1,13)
for i in range(11):
    fight('Hero')          # 11 Demons -> demon_horn (+piece_of_obsidian)

move('Hero',-1,12)
for i in range(13):
    fight('Hero')          # 13 Imps -> piece_of_obsidian & demoniac_dust

move('Hero',10,1)
for i in range(6):
    fight('Hero')          # 6 Owlbears -> owlbear_hair

move('Hero',8,6)
for i in range(4):
    fight('Hero')          # 4 Skeletons -> skeleton_bone

move('Hero',5,4)
for i in range(4):
    fight('Hero')          # 4 Flying Serpents -> serpent_skin

move('Hero',-3,0)
for i in range(5):
    fight('Hero')          # 5 Wolves -> wolf_hair

# --- gather raw resources ---
move('Hero',10,-4)
for i in range(56):
    gather('Hero')         # gold_ore

move('Hero',1,7)
for i in range(60):
    gather('Hero')         # iron_ore (+ chance sapphire)

move('Hero',1,6)
for i in range(100):
    gather('Hero')         # coal

move('Hero',3,6)
gather('Hero')             # magic_rocks -> magical_cure

move('Hero',0,6)
for i in range(3):
    gather('Hero')         # jasper_rocks -> jasper_crystal

move('Hero',9,8)
for i in range(88):
    gather('Hero')         # dead_wood

move('Hero',-1,0)
for i in range(33):
    gather('Hero')         # ash_wood (+sap)

move('Hero',-1,6)
for i in range(55):
    gather('Hero')         # birch_wood

# --- process ores / planks ---

craft('Hero','gold',7)
craft('Hero','steel',20)
craft('Hero','obsidian',6)

move('Hero',-2,-3)         # woodcutting workshop
craft('Hero','dead_wood_plank',11)
craft('Hero','hardwood_plank',11)

# --- craft equipment ---
move('Hero',2,1)           # weaponcrafting workshop
craft('Hero','greater_dreadful_staff',1)

move('Hero',3,1)           # gearcrafting workshop
craft('Hero','gold_shield',1)
craft('Hero','gold_platebody',1)
craft('Hero','obsidian_legs_armor',1)
craft('Hero','steel_boots',1)

move('Hero',1,3)           # jewelrycrafting workshop
craft('Hero','dreadful_ring',2)
craft('Hero','ruby_amulet',1)

# --- equip new gear ---
unequip('Hero','weapon')
equip('Hero','weapon','greater_dreadful_staff')

unequip('Hero','shield')
equip('Hero','shield','gold_shield')

unequip('Hero','body_armor')
equip('Hero','body_armor','gold_platebody')

unequip('Hero','leg_armor')
equip('Hero','leg_armor','obsidian_legs_armor')

unequip('Hero','boots')
equip('Hero','boots','steel_boots')

equip('Hero','ring1','dreadful_ring')
equip('Hero','ring2','dreadful_ring')

equip('Hero','amulet','ruby_amulet')

# --- defeat the Lich ---
move('Hero',9,7)
fight('Hero')

code:
# 1. Collect loot from required monsters
move('Hero', -5, -5)
for _ in range(12):
    fight('Hero')          # 12 Ogres → 12 eyes, 12 skins

move('Hero', 10, 6)
for _ in range(5):
    fight('Hero')          # 5 Vampires → 5 vampire blood

move('Hero', 8, 6)
for _ in range(4):
    fight('Hero')          # 4 Skeletons → 4 skeleton bones

move('Hero', 8, 7)
for _ in range(10):
    fight('Hero')          # 10 Death-Knights → 10 red cloth

move('Hero', 1, 13)
for _ in range(11):
    fight('Hero')          # 11 Demons → 11 horns + 11 obsidian pieces

move('Hero', 0, 13)
for _ in range(13):
    fight('Hero')          # 13 Imps → 13 obsidian pieces + demoniac dust

move('Hero', 10, 1)
for _ in range(3):
    fight('Hero')          # 3 Owlbears → 3 hairs

move('Hero', -3, 0)
for _ in range(5):
    fight('Hero')          # 5 Wolves → 5 hairs

# 2. Gather raw resources
move('Hero', 9, 8)
for _ in range(88):
    gather('Hero')         # 88 dead-wood

move('Hero', -1, 0)
for _ in range(30):
    gather('Hero')         # 30 ash-wood (and guaranteed 1 sap)

move('Hero', 3, 5)
for _ in range(40):
    gather('Hero')         # 40 birch-wood

move('Hero', 1, 7)
for _ in range(42):
    gather('Hero')         # 42 iron ore

move('Hero', 1, 6)
for _ in range(70):
    gather('Hero')         # 70 coal

move('Hero', 10, -4)
for _ in range(130):
    gather('Hero')         # 120+ gold ore and ≥2 sapphires

move('Hero', 3, 6)
for _ in range(5):
    gather('Hero')         # ≥1 magical cure

move('Hero', 0, 6)
for _ in range(4):
    gather('Hero')         # 4 jasper crystals

move('Hero', 2, 0)
for _ in range(5):
    gather('Hero')         # ≥1 emerald

# 3. Refine ores and wood
move('Hero', 1, 5)         # mining/forge
craft('Hero', 'steel', 14)
craft('Hero', 'gold', 15)
craft('Hero', 'obsidian', 6)

move('Hero', -2, -3)       # wood-cutting station
craft('Hero', 'dead_wood_plank', 11)
craft('Hero', 'hardwood_plank', 8)

# 4. Create final equipment
move('Hero', 2, 1)         # weapon-crafting
craft('Hero', 'greater_dreadful_staff', 1)

move('Hero', 1, 3)         # jewelry-crafting
craft('Hero', 'dreadful_ring', 2)
craft('Hero', 'emerald_amulet', 1)

move('Hero', 3, 1)         # gear-crafting
craft('Hero', 'obsidian_legs_armor', 1)
craft('Hero', 'gold_shield', 1)
craft('Hero', 'gold_platebody', 1)

# 5. Equip the new gear
unequip('Hero', 'weapon')
equip('Hero', 'weapon', 'greater_dreadful_staff')

unequip('Hero', 'shield')
equip('Hero', 'shield', 'gold_shield')

unequip('Hero', 'leg_armor')
equip('Hero', 'leg_armor', 'obsidian_legs_armor')

unequip('Hero', 'body_armor')
equip('Hero', 'body_armor', 'gold_platebody')

equip('Hero', 'ring1', 'dreadful_ring')
equip('Hero', 'ring2', 'dreadful_ring')
equip('Hero', 'amulet', 'emerald_amulet')

# 6. Hunt the Lich
move('Hero', 9, 7)
fight('Hero')

move('Hero', 10, 6)             # vampire
for _ in range(13):
    fight('Hero')               # 13 vampire_blood

move('Hero', 8, 7)              # death_knight
for _ in range(2):
    fight('Hero')               # 2 red_cloth

move('Hero', 8, 6)              # skeleton
for _ in range(7):
    fight('Hero')               # 7 skeleton_bone

move('Hero', 4, 8)              # bandit_lizard
for _ in range(13):
    fight('Hero')               # 13 lizard_skin

move('Hero', 1, 13)             # demon
for _ in range(4):
    fight('Hero')               # 4 demon_horn

move('Hero', 0, 13)             # imp
for _ in range(36):
    fight('Hero')               # 36 piece_of_obsidian, 4+ demoniac_dust

move('Hero', 10, 1)             # owlbear
for _ in range(3):
    fight('Hero')               # 3 owlbear_hair

move('Hero', 5, 4)              # flying_serpent
for _ in range(5):
    fight('Hero')               # 5 flying_wing

move('Hero', -1, 13)            # cultist_acolyte
for _ in range(4):
    fight('Hero')               # 4 cursed_book

move('Hero', 9, 7)              # lich
fight('Hero')                   # life_crystal (third one)

# Process ores/bars and planks
move('Hero', 1, 5)              # mining workshop
for _ in range(23):
    craft('Hero', 'gold', 1)    # 23 gold
for _ in range(9):
    craft('Hero', 'obsidian', 1)# 9 obsidian

move('Hero', -2, -3)            # woodcutting workshop
for _ in range(27):
    craft('Hero', 'dead_wood_plank', 1)   # 27 planks
for _ in range(8):
    craft('Hero', 'magical_plank', 1)     # 8 magical planks

# Craft weapon
move('Hero', 2, 1)              # weaponcrafting workshop
craft('Hero', 'greater_dreadful_staff', 1)

# Craft gear
move('Hero', 3, 1)              # gearcrafting workshop
craft('Hero', 'gold_shield', 1)
craft('Hero', 'lizard_skin_armor', 1)
craft('Hero', 'lizard_skin_legs_armor', 1)
craft('Hero', 'lizard_boots', 1)

# Craft jewelry
move('Hero', 1, 3)              # jewelrycrafting workshop
craft('Hero', 'gold_ring', 1)
craft('Hero', 'sapphire_ring', 1)
craft('Hero', 'diamond_amulet', 1)

# Equip new items
unequip('Hero', 'weapon')
equip('Hero', 'weapon', 'greater_dreadful_staff')

equip('Hero', 'shield', 'gold_shield')

unequip('Hero', 'body_armor')
equip('Hero', 'body_armor', 'lizard_skin_armor')

unequip('Hero', 'leg_armor')
equip('Hero', 'leg_armor', 'lizard_skin_legs_armor')

unequip('Hero', 'boots')
equip('Hero', 'boots', 'lizard_boots')

equip('Hero', 'ring1', 'gold_ring')
equip('Hero', 'ring2', 'sapphire_ring')

equip('Hero', 'amulet', 'diamond_amulet')

equip('Hero', 'artifact2', 'life_crystal')   # third Life Crystal

# Hunt the Cultist Emperor
move('Hero', -2, 13)            # cultist_emperor location
fight('Hero')

Successfully created custom character - Hero.

code:
# 1. Gather ores, wood and other raw resources
move('Hero', 10, -4)                 # gold_rocks
for _ in range(216):                 # 216 gold ore
    gather('Hero')

move('Hero', -1, 7)                  # strange_rocks
for _ in range(40):                  # 40 strange ore
    gather('Hero')

move('Hero', 9, 8)                   # dead_tree
for _ in range(42):                  # 42 dead wood
    gather('Hero')

move('Hero', -3, 7)                  # magic_tree
for _ in range(30):                  # 30 magic wood
    gather('Hero')

move('Hero', -1, 0)                  # ash_tree
for _ in range(24):                  # 24 ash wood
    gather('Hero')

move('Hero', 3, 5)                   # birch_tree
for _ in range(40):                  # 40 birch wood
    gather('Hero')

move('Hero', 3, 6)                   # magic_rocks  → magical_cure
for _ in range(7):                   # 7 magical cure
    gather('Hero')

move('Hero', 0, 6)                   # jasper_rocks
for _ in range(2):                   # 2 jasper crystal
    gather('Hero')

# 2. Hunt monsters for mob-loot resources
move('Hero', -1, 12)                 # imp  → piece_of_obsidian
for _ in range(56):
    fight('Hero')

move('Hero', 1, 13)                  # demon → demon horn + piece_of_obsidian
for _ in range(9):
    fight('Hero')

move('Hero', 10, 6)                  # vampire → vampire blood
for _ in range(18):
    fight('Hero')

move('Hero', 8, 7)                   # death knight → red cloth
for _ in range(3):
    fight('Hero')

move('Hero', 10, 1)                  # owlbear → owlbear hair
for _ in range(10):
    fight('Hero')

move('Hero', 4, 8)                   # bandit lizard → lizard skin
for _ in range(10):
    fight('Hero')

move('Hero', -1, 13)                 # cultist acolyte → magic stone & cursed book
for _ in range(3):
    fight('Hero')

move('Hero', -3, 0)                  # wolf → wolf hair
for _ in range(5):
    fight('Hero')

# 3. Refine raw resources (bars & planks)
move('Hero', 1, 5)                   # mining workshop
craft('Hero', 'gold', 24)            # 24 gold bars
craft('Hero', 'obsidian', 14)        # 14 obsidian bars
craft('Hero', 'strangold', 8)        # 8 strangold bars

move('Hero', -2, -3)                 # woodcutting workshop
craft('Hero', 'dead_wood_plank', 3)  # 3 dead-wood planks
craft('Hero', 'magical_plank', 6)    # 6 magical planks
craft('Hero', 'hardwood_plank', 8)   # 8 hardwood planks

# 4. Forge weapon
move('Hero', 2, 1)                   # weapon-crafting workshop
craft('Hero', 'gold_sword', 1)

# 5. Craft armour & boots
move('Hero', 3, 1)                   # gear-crafting workshop
craft('Hero', 'obsidian_helmet', 1)
craft('Hero', 'strangold_armor', 1)
craft('Hero', 'ancient_jean', 1)
craft('Hero', 'gold_boots', 1)

# 6. Craft jewellery
move('Hero', 1, 3)                   # jewellery-crafting workshop
craft('Hero', 'topaz_ring', 1)
craft('Hero', 'topaz_amulet', 1)

# 7. Equip the new gear
unequip('Hero', 'weapon')
equip('Hero', 'weapon', 'gold_sword')

equip('Hero', 'helmet', 'obsidian_helmet')

unequip('Hero', 'body_armor')
equip('Hero', 'body_armor', 'strangold_armor')

unequip('Hero', 'leg_armor')
equip('Hero', 'leg_armor', 'ancient_jean')

unequip('Hero', 'boots')
equip('Hero', 'boots', 'gold_boots')

equip('Hero', 'ring1', 'topaz_ring')
equip('Hero', 'amulet', 'topaz_amulet')

# 8. Hunt the Cultist Emperor
move('Hero', -2, 13)                 # cultist emperor location
fight('Hero')
